description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:alpine Docker image with two stages: test and deploy, and configure a cache keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} that stores node_modules/. In the test stage add a lint job that runs npm install then npm run lint, and a unit test job that runs npm install then npm run test -- --color, both using the shared before_script and cache. In the deploy stage add a deploy version job that runs only on tags, writes the secret $NPMRC to .npmrc, updates the version field in package.json to $CI_COMMIT_TAG with a sed command, and then runs npm publish. No artifacts or services are defined.
